free_text: Investigating the decay of 165Dy nuclei using the
Dysprosium oxide Dy(2)O(3) enriched to 97% of Dy-164
Two Ge(Li)-detectors of 60 and 80 cm3 volume,
energy resolution near 3.5 keV for Co-60 gamma-line.
Registration efficiency for Co-60 cascade of lines
Energy dependence of spectrometer efficiency was
- 5556.4 keV gamma-line direct transition to 158.6 keV
Registration of two-gamma cascades with fixed
The article was checked, BIB information was updated.
STATUS was corrected for new rules.
(N,2G) -> (N,G), REL -> MSC in REACTION according to

maximal error of gamma transition energy E1,E2
